title: crataegus oxyacantha var. azarella
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha var. azarella, also known as hawthorn berry, is a variety of the hawthorn plant, which is a deciduous shrub or small tree that produces small, fragrant flowers and red, berry-like fruits. The medicinal properties of Crataegus oxyacantha var. azarella lie in its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving blood flow, and lowering cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Crataegus oxyacantha var. azarella can be made into teas, tinctures, capsules, and infusions, which can be used to support overall cardiovascular health and well-being.
